title: tephrosia uliginosa
intro: Tephrosia uliginosa, commonly known as Marsh Tephrosia, is a plant species in the pea family (Leguminosae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The therapeutic actions of Tephrosia uliginosa are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been reported to exhibit antimicrobial and antimalarial properties.
